parsed_structure.video_summary: This tutorial provides a comprehensive guide on using Google's Opal AI platform to build, customize, and share AI-powered mini-apps using natural language.

tasks.title: Get started with Opal
tasks.description: Access the Opal platform and set up a user account.

steps.title: Sign in
steps.description: Click sign in, select Google account, and grant permissions.

tasks.title: Create a new Opal app
tasks.description: Build a custom AI mini-app from scratch using natural language prompts.

steps.title: Click Create New
steps.description: Select the option to create a new app from the dashboard.

steps.title: Enter prompt
steps.description: Type the description of the desired app into the prompt box.

steps.title: Submit prompt
steps.description: Click the go button to generate the app workflow.

tasks.title: Configure and customize the app
tasks.description: Adjust app nodes, themes, and settings to refine the AI workflow.

steps.title: Edit node settings
steps.description: Select nodes to change models or rename them.

steps.title: Select AI model
steps.description: Choose specific AI models for individual workflow steps.

steps.title: Configure output
steps.description: Select the desired output format, such as web page with auto layout.

tasks.title: Run and share the app
tasks.description: Execute the app, test it, and publish it for others to use.

steps.title: Start app
steps.description: Click start to run the app and provide input.

steps.title: Share app
steps.description: Click share app and set permissions to public.

steps.title: Copy link
steps.description: Copy the generated link to share with others.
